# Team momentum builds and continues

## Short Teaching Summary
Team momentum builds and continues: A team that has a lot of momentum is really on the move and is going to be hard to stop. Key detail: In sports, a team that has momentum is on the move and is going to take some effort to stop. Key detail: In sports, a team that has momentum is on the move and is going to take some effort to stop. Map connection: this idea links by analogy_for to nearby concepts.
